speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Nine. By now, the work should feel familiar. Not easy, but known. You’ve learned how to stand, how to move, how to strike, and how to protect yourself. Today is about readiness. Next session, you’ll move through a full round. Not constant pressure. Not every punch. But the shape of it. The rhythm of it. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Session Nine. This session prepares you for longer movement. You won’t rush. You won’t empty the tank. You’ll work, then you’ll settle. We start steady.

speaker: MAC
text: Set your stance. Hands up. This warm-up finds rhythm. Jab. Cross. Pause. After me. Four at a time. Jab. Cross. Pause. One. Jab. Cross. Pause. Two. Jab. Cross. Pause. Three. Jab. Cross. Pause. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stay loose.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we add awareness. Slip. Cross. Reset. You respond, then you settle. The pause matters.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Slip. Cross. Reset. One. Slip. Cross. Reset. Two. Slip. Cross. Reset. Three. Slip. Cross. Reset. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Hands down briefly if needed.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we stretch the sequence. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. Not speed. Control.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. One. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. Two. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. Three. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Breathe.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we add movement. Punch. Turn. Settle. You move, then you organise again.

speaker: MAC
text: After me. Four at a time. Jab. Pivot. Set. One. Jab. Pivot. Set. Two. Jab. Pivot. Set. Three. Jab. Pivot. Set. Four. Pause. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Pause. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Let the arms hang.

speaker: MAC
text: Take a breath. This session wasn’t about pushing. It was about pacing. You worked. You settled. You stayed present. Well done.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Nine complete. You’ve built the rhythm a full round needs. Next session is different. A full round. Start to finish. Guided the whole way. No pressure. Just presence. Session Ten is there when you’re ready.
